author: anon-13168fa2
content: Rewrote Tool 4 Rust install section in 00-foundations/04-your-workspace.md with a numbered 8-step Windows walkthrough that covers: rustup-init.exe download, MSVC build tools detection, Visual Studio Installer Desktop development with C++ workload (with multi-gig download warning), the critical 'close and reopen terminal' step, and the common linker 'link.exe' not found error message for search-engine findability. Also added WSL2 as a valid alternative for Windows users who prefer the Linux experience. Mac/Linux path preserved with the option-1 prompt and terminal-restart habit added.
